name: ExtensionNutritionOrder_SupportingInformation
title: R5: Information to support fulfilling of the nutrition order (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `NutritionOrder.supportingInformation` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`NutritionOrder.supportingInformation` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Resource)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `NutritionOrder.supportingInformation` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Resource)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `NutritionOrder.supportingInformation` has a context of NutritionOrder based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `NutritionOrder`.
Element `NutritionOrder.supportingInformation` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Information to support fulfilling of the nutrition order (new)
element.comment:

Element `NutritionOrder.supportingInformation` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: Information to support fulfilling of the nutrition order
element.definition: Information to support fulfilling (i.e. dispensing or administering) of the nutrition,        for example, patient height and weight).
